summary: B.E. Computer Science student specializing in AI & ML at the University of Mumbai. Enthusiastic AI/ML and Mobile Developer with hands-on experience building generative AI integrations, deep learning pipelines, and responsive cross-platform mobile apps. Proficient in Python, Dart, PyTorch, and Flutter. Passionate about automating workflows and designing scalable AI-driven solutions.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)

experience.company: AI Research Lab, University of Mumbai
description: Developing and testing state-of-the-art NLP models for local language translation using PyTorch and Hugging Face Transformers.
Optimized inference speeds by 40% by implementing model quantization and fine-tuning lightweight distilBERT architectures.
Collaborated with professors to publish research on low-resource machine translation in regional languages.
Built and deployed a cross-platform mobile application using Flutter and Dart with real-time Firebase backend integration.
Implemented secure user authentication, push notifications, and local offline caching using Hive, reducing load times by 25%.
Redesigned the application UI using Material Design 3 guidelines, resulting in a 15% increase in user retention.

projects.title: AI-Powered Job Hunting Agent
description: Architected an automated multi-agent pipeline using Python and Gemini 2.5 Flash API to search, filter, and score jobs.
Integrated Semantic Search using sentence-transformers to calculate ATS keyword matches against job descriptions.
Automated personalized resume and cover letter generation using Jinja2 and WeasyPrint PDF engines.
Developed a real-time Telegram notifier and automated workflow via GitHub Actions, reducing manual job hunting time by 95%.

projects.title: GenAI-Enabled Mobile Assistant
description: Created an Android application using Flutter and Dart that integrates Gemini LLM for dynamic context-aware assistant features.
Developed custom vector search client on-device using local ChromaDB wrappers for fast retrieval-augmented generation (RAG).
Achieved fluid UI animations and custom themes, leveraging modern Flutter state management (Bloc/Cubit) and clean architecture.

projects.title: Deep Learning Object Detection System
description: Trained and evaluated a YOLOv8 model in PyTorch on a custom dataset of 10k images for industrial quality inspection.
Integrated the detection model with an API endpoint built using FastAPI and containerized the setup using Docker for easy deployment.
Optimized pipeline to run at 30+ FPS on standard CPU hardware using ONNX Runtime optimizations.

certifications: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer (Candidate)
achievements: Ranked in top 5% in University of Mumbai Hackathon 2024 for developing an AI-based automated medical diagnosis assistant.
Contributed to open-source Generative AI repositories, landing PRs in LangChain community integrations.
